sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
print(f"Blue: rows {blue['boundary'][0][0]}-{blue['boundary'][2][0]}, cols {blue['boundary'][0][1]}-{blue['boundary'][1][1]}")
green = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N'][0]
print(f"Timer: {green['pixels']}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Check adjacency - is blue now adjacent to charcoal or magenta?
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
blue_id = [n['id'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
charcoal_id = [n['id'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'c'][0]
magenta_id = [n['id'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'M'][0]
print(f"Blue adjacent to charcoal: {any([a, b] == [blue_id, charcoal_id] or [a, b] == [charcoal_id, blue_id] for a, b in adj)}")
print(f"Blue adjacent to magenta: {any([a, b] == [blue_id, magenta_id] or [a, b] == [magenta_id, blue_id] for a, b in adj)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
